code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut evens_str = ""
mut odds_str = ""
mut evens_first = true
mut odds_first = true

mut i = 0
mut outer = true
while outer
  mut b = 0
  mut found = false
  mut scanning = true
  while scanning
    if i >= n
      scanning = false
    else
      match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(c)
        if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
          i = i + 1
        else
          b = c
          found = true
          scanning = false
        end
      when None
        scanning = false
      end
    end
  end
  if not found
    outer = false
  else
    mut sign = 1
    if b == 45
      sign = -1
      i = i + 1
    else if b == 43
      i = i + 1
    end
    mut num = 0
    mut has_digit = false
    mut parsing = true
    while parsing
      if i >= n
        parsing = false
      else
        match string.byte_at(input, i)
        when Some(c)
          if c >= 48 and c <= 57
            num = num * 10 + (c - 48)
            has_digit = true
            i = i + 1
          else
            parsing = false
          end
        when None
          parsing = false
        end
      end
    end
    if has_digit
      let value = num * sign
      if value % 2 == 0
        if evens_first
          evens_str = "#{value}"
          evens_first = false
        else
          evens_str = "#{evens_str} #{value}"
        end
      else
        if odds_first
          odds_str = "#{value}"
          odds_first = false
        else
          odds_str = "#{odds_str} #{value}"
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

println("evens=#{evens_str}")
println("odds=#{odds_str}")
